rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the three core api-design problems confirmable in the diff: the tautological curvature_gauge_transformation, the vacuous oriented : True field, and the redundant banach_steinhaus wrapper, and both request_changes with equivalent remediation. Review 2's extra out-of-scope/roadmap framing rests on unshown roadmap context and doesn't add an actionable api-design fix beyond what Review 1 already covers, so acting on either yields an equally improved PR.
